name: shooter
description: 横向射击。飞船发射子弹消灭敌人，被敌人碰到则失败。
dsl: create object name=Ship type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#00AAFF width=48 height=32 scene=Game
create object name=Bullet type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#FFFF00 width=4 height=12 scene=Game
create object name=Enemy type=ShapePainter shape=circle color=#DC3232 width=28 height=28 scene=Game
create object name=ScoreText type=Text scene=Game size=24
set variable name=Score value=0 type=Number scope=global
on key Left -> move Ship to 300,550
on key Right -> move Ship to 500,550
on key Space -> spawn Bullet at 400,500
on collision Bullet Enemy -> destroy Bullet, destroy Enemy, score+10
